name: Baker
ability: You start knowing 3 characters, 1 and only 1 of which is in play.

name: Falconer
ability: Each dusk*, you may visit the Storyteller to learn how many townsfolk are alive. [+0 or +1 Outsiders]

name: Hangman
ability: On your 1st day, choose a player. If they are a good & they don't declare their character immediately, they die.

name: Bon Vivant
ability: Your alive neighbors (Not including travelers) are drunk

name: Apothecary
ability: Once per game, suggest a new game rule. If the storyteller agrees, you die, but your rule is included.

name: Bodyguard
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a character (not yourself): evil abilities that would affect them specifically, don't.

name: Voyeur
ability: Each night*, choose a player: if they died tonight, all players learn you are the Voyeur.

name: Hustler
ability: Each night*, you learn which character nominated you today. If you were mad that you were the hustler, you get false info.

name: Scavenger
ability: If both of your good neighbors die, something good happens to your team.

name: Genius
ability: Each night, choose a good character: you have that ability until you choose again. You are drunk every other night.

name: Weaver
ability: You start knowing a set of players. Each day, you may privately guess what it is.

name: Stableboy
ability: Each night, you learn 1 in-play character.

name: Nun
ability: Good Townsfolk can not be drunk, poisoned, or get false information.[+0 or +1 Outsider]

name: Scavenger
ability: If both of your good neighbors die, something good happens to your team.

name: Blacksmith
ability: You start knowing how many Outsiders are in play. All Outsiders are drunk even if you are dead. [-? to +? Outsiders]

name: Mole
ability: You are a Minion too. If the Demon publicly Guesses you (once), your team loses even if dead, drunk or poisoned.

name: Piper
ability: Once per game, publicly choose that from now on: Minions can privately choose to turn good, but the next executee's team loses.

name: Constable
ability: Each night, choose an evil character: you learn 1 or more characters that are not this character.

name: Beekeeper
ability: You choose which 3 good characters (not the Beekeeper) the Demon gets as bluffs.

name: Pirate
ability: You start knowing how many Pirates are in play. if Pirates are the only good character alive, good wins. [+0 to +2 Pirates]

name: Shaman
ability: Evil players think they are different evil characters. They learn what they are when the shaman dies.

name: Locksmith
ability: You think you are an Outsider, but you are not. The 1st time you are executed, something good happens. [+0 or +1 Outsider]

name: Palm Reader
ability: The Demon acts one night before it takes effect. Each night, you learn which player(s) the demon attacked.

name: Taxman
ability: Evil can't win. The 1st time evil would win, the Demon learns you are the Taxman tonight.

name: Machinist
ability: On your 1st day, visit the Storyteller to become a non-listed character, even if drunk or poisoned. [+0 to +2 Machinists]

name: Coachman
ability: Each day, choose a 1-word topic on which the Storyteller gives a fact. If your neighbors are different alignments, it is false.

name: Diplomat
ability: You start knowing which players are minions. If a minion you know is executed, your team loses, even if you're dead.

name: Druid
ability: You start knowing which players are minions. If a minion you know is executed, your team loses, even if you're dead.

name: Fairy
ability: If the demon attacks a player it attacks one of their living neighbors instead. Each night* choose if you are drunk or not.

name: Houndskeeper
ability: Each night, you learn how many steps to the nearest living player targeted by an evil player.

name: Insomniac
ability: Each night, you learn a character that died tonight.

name: Leper
ability: If the demon kills you, it is poisoned.

name: Leper
ability: If either alive neighbors died by execution today, all players are safe from the Demon tonight.

name: Merchant
ability: Once per game you & 1 other player may choose to make a deal. Whoever breaks the deal, loses.

name: Messanger
ability: Once per game, publicly ask a question. On the final night, even if you are dead, an alive player gets the answer.

name: Moneylender
ability: Each night, choose an alive player (Not yourself), you become their alignment.

name: Mystic
ability: If you died at night, you are reborn as a good character of your choice on the final night, even if drunk or poisoned.

name: Nanny
ability: At night, other player with both hands over their eyes can not die, but if you die, they die too.

name: Poet
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn how many of a particular letter is in their character name. (But not which letter)

name: Prophet
ability: On your 1st night, choose a day number: if all dead players are good that dawn, they are resurrected as Travelers.

name: Quack
ability: Each night, choose 2 living players: abilities that target 1 target the other instead. The demon cannot die this way.

name: Scholar
ability: You start knowing which Demon(s) & Minion(s) are in play.

name: Schoolmarm
ability: Players who turn evil learn you are in play & may choose to remain good. [1 evil-creating character is in-play]

name: Strongman
ability: If you were the only player mad about being the Strongman today & a player chooses you tonight for any reason, they die.

name: Thespian
ability: Each day a good and an evil player are each 'mad' about something, or they might die.

name: Tycoon
ability: Each night*, learn if you shook hands with an evil player today. 1 player that you have ever shaken hands with is drunk.

name: Witch Hunter
ability: Each night, Choose a player: you learn their alignment. If they are not executed tomorrow, they turn evil. You can not be evil.

name: Feathermaster
ability: Each day, publicly choose a player: if either of you die tonight, an alive Minion dies instead, if possible.

name: Donkey Wrangler
ability: If you are nominated, the demon must be executed today, or your team loses. [Your token is a square]

name: Bully
ability: Any players who vote differently to you might die at any time.

name: Prisoner
ability: You may not vote. You know 1 not-in-play character. If most players choose to free you, become that character & alignment.

name: Tramp
ability: If there are any votes to execute you, you might be executed immediately

name: Golden Child
ability: The 1st player to nominate you, turns evil that night, even if you are dead. If it's you, your team loses.

name: Daredevil
ability: If you are not mad as an in-play Townsfolk, a Townsfolk might die, even if you are dead.

name: Casanova
ability: Each night, choose a living player (not yourself): if they are executed & they are good, your team loses.

name: Charalatan
ability: The 1st time a player dies during the day, you become their alignment from tonight onwards.

name: Troll
ability: Each night, choose your alignment. On the final night even if you are dead, 1 player learns the Troll is in play.

name: Haunt
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they learn this. if you have chosen all alive good players, evil wins. Good can't win.

name: Imposter
ability: You poison & gain the ability of the 1st in-play character that you are mad about being each day.

name: Puppeteer
ability: The Storyteller might do what you ask (within the rules), including answering questions and passing messages.

name: Racketeer
ability: If a successful vote is tied, one of the nominees (not the Demon) is executed immediately.

name: Amaniti
ability: Your neighbors register falsely to good players' abilities.

name: Amaniti
ability: Your neighbors register falsely to good players' abilities.

name: Vat Dweller
ability: All Outsiders are the same Outsider, you might choose which.[-? to +? Outsiders]

name: Copycat
ability: You are another in-play Minion too. If no other Minions are in play, choose which Minion you are.

name: Damned
ability: If all good players die, good wins. The Demon cannot kill the last living Damned.[+0 to +2 Damned]

name: Vampire
ability: You wake during Demon info instead of Minion info. You know which Minion is good.[+1 good minion who thinks they're evil]

name: Senator
ability: Players may only nominate their living neighbors, even if you are dead.

name: Familiar
ability: Each night*, you wake with the demon & choose a player: they die. If you die, the demon loses its ability for the night.

name: Klaun
ability: Each night, you choose up to 3 players: they think they are mad, but are not.

name: Necromancer
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: they register as alive and think they have an ability, but don't.

name: Riddle Fiend
ability: On the final day, even if you are dead, all players learn the Riddle Fiend is in play and guess who you are. Unless 2 players do, Evil wins.

name: Ring Master
ability: Once per game, choose to become (or assist) the storyteller. You may still vote.

name: Scarecrow
ability: To good players, you register as the Demon & the Demon registers as a minion

name: Sicilian
ability: When nominations are called, if you publicly choose a player (Not yourself) & they are not executed today, Their team wins.

name: Smuggler
ability: On the 1st night choose a good player: they learn you are 1 of 3 players. [+1 Minion, all Minions are Smugglers]

name: Queen of Lies
ability: Each night*, you may choose 3 players (all players learn who): each silently chooses a different alive player, 2 of whom die.

name: Hwisp
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If a Townsfolk nominates you, you die. Each day if 2 Townsfolk nominate, evil wins.

name: Tipi-Tipi
ability: Each night*, a player dies. On the final night, choose 2 players: the 1st is mad the 2nd is not the Demon or their team loses.

name: Fanzazz
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & you become their alignment. If you die your team loses. If just 2 players live, your team wins.

name: Fanzazz
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & you become their alignment. If you die your team loses. If just 2 players live, your team wins.

id: Each night*, choose up to 3 players: they learn that they are marked. Or, choose that all marked players die.
name: Fanzazz
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & you become their alignment. If you die your team loses. If just 2 players live, your team wins.

name: Word of God
ability: Each dusk*, for each good player with a hand raised, choose a player: they die. If no one living raised a hand, evil wins.

name: Word of God
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they turn evil and learn who you are. Once per game, you lose this ability.[No Minions]

name: Hydra
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. 1 ally of each executee is the spawn. If you are executed the spawn becomes Hydra.

name: J'Nak
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. 1 good player knows you are 1 of 2 players. If you are executed while a minion lives, evil wins.

name: Le Cadeau
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. The 1st townsfolk to nominate Le Cadeau becomes an evil Le Cadeau and you die tonight.

name: Shacklewight
ability: Each night, choose any number of players: they all wake together. Tomorrow day, if one dies they all die. 1 Player must die each day.

name: Sissaphyth
ability: At night, if 1 good player and 1 evil player are dead, choose a Demon: become it, acting twice each night.

name: Soul Hammer
ability: Each night*, choose a player, they die. After the final night, the dead may not talk to the living.

name: The Rising
ability: All Players start dead. If executed. They are raised from the dead. If all players of 1 alignment are alive, their team wins.

name: Zodian
ability: A character dies each night*, in script order. Evil players start knowing all not-in-play good characters.
